title: juncus procerus
intro: Juncus procerus, also known as Hard Rush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it effective in treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary issues. The health benefits of Juncus procerus include its potential to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Juncus procerus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
